comma 0.2.0

Deprecated coverage accessor for commaData objects

Source: R/accessors.R
coverage-commaData-method.Rd

coverage(commaData) is deprecated because coverage() is an established IRanges/GenomicRanges generic for computing genomic coverage, not for retrieving an assay matrix. Use siteCoverage instead.

Usage

# S4 method for class 'commaData'
coverage(x, shift = 0L, width = NULL, weight = 1L, ...)

Arguments

x

A commaData object.

shift, width, weight, ...

Inherited from IRanges::coverage. These arguments are not meaningful for the commaData assay accessor and must be left at their defaults.

Value

An integer matrix with rows corresponding to methylation sites and columns corresponding to samples.

On this page

Developed by Carl Stone.
